title: cienfuegosia intermedia
intro: Cienfuegosia intermedia, also known as the Mexican hibiscus or roselle, is a plant species in the Malvaceae family, native to Central America and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, offering various health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cienfuegosia intermedia include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make jams, preserves, and other food products, as well as being used in skincare and cosmetic applications.
